flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at New England College are 20% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($42.1k vs $52.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 35% at New England College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (980 vs 1.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at New England College fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at New England College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.9% → 0.0%).
